---
title: "Calendar"
---

Upcoming events:

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(calendR)
library(lubridate)

# Highlight specific days (day of the year or dates in the month)
#special_days <- c(15, 42, 100, 150, 200)   # or use yday() on real dates

calendR(year = 2026, 
        month = 6,                    # June 2026 (omit for full year)
#        special.days = special_days,
#        special.col = "#FF6B6B",      # Highlight color
        title = "June 2026",
        start = "M")
```
